nasb.text: However, You bore with them for many years, And admonished them by Your Spirit through Your prophets, Yet they would not give ear. Therefore You gave them into the hand of the peoples of the lands.

esv.text: Many years you bore with them and warned them by your Spirit through your prophets. Yet they would not give ear. Therefore you gave them into the hand of the peoples of the lands.

cnv.text: 你多年容忍他們， 你的靈藉著你的眾先知勸戒他們， 他們還是不側耳而聽， 所以你把他們交在各地的民族手中。

ccb.text: 你多年来容忍他们，差遣你的灵借着你的众先知警告他们，但他们依然不肯听从，于是你把他们交在列邦手中。
